_note: data/source/entries.src.json에서 tools/build-entries/build.py로 생성. 직접 편집하지 말 것.

senses.en: to say that someone can do something

examples.en: My parents {{allow}} me to play after homework.
examples.ko: 우리 부모님은 숙제 후에 노는 걸 허락하세요.

examples.en: The teacher {{allowed}} us to go outside.
examples.ko: 선생님이 우리에게 밖에 나가도 된다고 하셨어요.

senses.en: a round red or green fruit that grows on a tree

examples.en: I ate a red {{apple}} after lunch today.
examples.ko: 나는 오늘 점심 먹고 빨간 사과를 먹었어요.

examples.en: There are many {{apples}} on that tree.

senses.en: the long part of your body between your hand and your body

examples.en: He carried the box in his {{arms}}.
Raise your {{arm}} if you know the answer.

senses.en: the sister of your mother or your father

examples.en: My {{aunt}} gave me a nice present.
examples.ko: 우리 이모가 나에게 멋진 선물을 줬어요.

examples.en: We visited my {{aunt}} last weekend.

senses.en: a very young child that can not walk or talk

examples.en: The {{baby}} is sleeping in her bed.
A {{baby}} cries when it is hungry.

senses.en: not good

examples.en: Too much candy is {{bad}} for your teeth.
examples.ko: 사탕을 너무 많이 먹으면 이에 나빠요.

examples.en: I had a {{bad}} dream last night.

senses.en: a thing that you carry books or food in

examples.en: My school {{bag}} is very heavy today.
She put an apple in her {{bag}}.

senses.en: a round thing that you kick or catch when you play games

examples.en: The children kick the {{ball}} in the park.
He caught the {{ball}} with both hands.

senses.en: a long yellow fruit with soft white food inside

examples.en: My sister eats a {{banana}} every morning.
examples.ko: 우리 언니는 매일 아침 바나나를 하나 먹어요.

examples.en: The monkey took my yellow {{banana}}.

senses.en: a thing that you carry fruit or bread in

examples.en: She put apples in the {{basket}}.
The {{basket}} is full of fresh bread.

senses.en: the land with sand next to the sea

examples.en: We played on the {{beach}} all day.
There is soft white sand on this {{beach}}.
examples.ko: 이 해변에는 부드러운 하얀 모래가 있어요.

senses.en: a big heavy animal covered with thick brown hair

examples.en: A brown {{bear}} was fishing in the river.
examples.ko: 갈색 곰이 강에서 물고기를 잡고 있었어요.

examples.en: The {{bear}} sleeps all winter in a cave.

senses.en: the thing that you sleep on at night

examples.en: I go to {{bed}} at nine every night.
examples.ko: 나는 매일 밤 아홉 시에 자러 가요.

examples.en: The cat is sleeping on my {{bed}}.

senses.en: a small insect that flies from flower to flower

examples.en: A {{bee}} is sitting on the yellow flower.
examples.ko: 벌 한 마리가 노란 꽃에 앉아 있어요.

examples.en: The {{bees}} fly around the garden all day.

senses.en: a thing that makes a sound when you hit or push it

examples.en: The school {{bell}} rings at nine.
She pushed the {{bell}} on the door.

senses.en: a long thing that you wear around your body to hold up your pants

examples.en: He wears a black {{belt}} every day.
My {{belt}} is too long for me.

senses.en: large in size

examples.en: They live in a {{big}} house.
An elephant is a very {{big}} animal.

senses.en: a thing with two wheels that you ride and move with your legs

examples.en: I ride my {{bike}} to the park.
He got a new {{bike}} for his birthday.

senses.en: a small animal that can fly high in the sky

examples.en: A little {{bird}} is singing in the tree.
The {{bird}} flew high up into the sky.

senses.en: having the colour of the night sky with no light

examples.en: A tiger has {{black}} lines on its body.
He has short {{black}} hair and brown eyes.

senses.en: having the colour of the sky on a clear day

examples.en: The sea looks very {{blue}} today.
He drew a big {{blue}} car.

senses.en: a thing that carries people on water

examples.en: We rode a small {{boat}} on the lake.
The {{boat}} moved slowly across the river.

senses.en: a set of many pages with words and pictures that you read

examples.en: I read a fun {{book}} before I sleep.
examples.ko: 나는 자기 전에 재미있는 책을 읽어요.

examples.en: She has many {{books}} on her desk.

senses.en: a tall glass or plastic thing that holds water or milk

examples.en: Please give me that {{bottle}} of water.
The baby drinks milk from a {{bottle}}.

senses.en: a container with flat sides for keeping things

examples.en: I put my toys in a big {{box}}.
There are ten {{boxes}} in the room.

senses.en: a young male child

examples.en: The {{boy}} is playing with his dog.
Two {{boys}} are running in the park.

senses.en: not afraid when something is hard or dangerous

examples.en: The {{brave}} boy helped the small child.
Be {{brave}} and try one more time.

senses.en: a food that people bake and eat with butter or jam

examples.en: I eat {{bread}} with butter for breakfast.
examples.ko: 나는 아침으로 버터를 바른 빵을 먹어요.

examples.en: My mother makes fresh {{bread}} every week.
examples.ko: 우리 엄마는 매주 갓 구운 빵을 만들어요.

senses.en: giving much light

examples.en: The sun is very {{bright}} today.
She wore a {{bright}} yellow dress.

senses.en: a boy who has the same mother and father as you

examples.en: My big {{brother}} helps me with homework.
He has two {{brothers}} and one sister.
examples.ko: 그는 남자 형제가 둘, 여자 형제가 하나 있어요.

senses.en: a very big thing that carries many people on roads

examples.en: I take the {{bus}} to school.
The {{bus}} stops in front of my house.

senses.en: having many things to do

examples.en: My mother is {{busy}} in the morning.
The market is {{busy}} on weekends.

senses.en: a soft yellow food made from milk

examples.en: I put {{butter}} on my warm bread.
We need {{butter}} to make this cake.

senses.en: a small round thing that you push or that holds clothes

examples.en: Please push the small red {{button}} now.
One {{button}} on my shirt is gone.

senses.en: to get something by giving money for it

examples.en: I want to {{buy}} a new toy.
She {{bought}} some bread at the shop.

senses.en: a soft sweet food that people eat at a party

examples.en: We ate {{cake}} at her birthday party.
examples.ko: 우리는 그녀의 생일 파티에서 케이크를 먹었어요.

examples.en: My mother made a chocolate {{cake}}.

senses.en: to say someone's name so they will come

examples.en: My mother will {{call}} me for dinner.
examples.ko: 엄마가 저녁 먹으라고 나를 부를 거예요.

examples.en: Please {{call}} me when you are ready.

senses.en: a thing that you use to take pictures

examples.en: My father took a photo with his {{camera}}.
May I use your new {{camera}}, please?

senses.en: a very sweet food that children like to eat

examples.en: The children ate too much {{candy}}.
She gave each child a small {{candy}}.
examples.ko: 그녀는 아이들에게 작은 사탕을 하나씩 줬어요.

senses.en: a thing with four wheels that people ride in on roads

examples.en: My father drives a blue {{car}}.
We go to the sea by {{car}}.

senses.en: a long orange vegetable that grows under the ground

examples.en: A rabbit likes to eat a {{carrot}}.
My mother put {{carrots}} in the soup.

senses.en: to hold something and take it to another place

examples.en: I {{carry}} a bag to school every day.
examples.ko: 나는 매일 가방을 메고 학교에 가요.

examples.en: He helped me {{carry}} the heavy box.
examples.ko: 그가 무거운 상자 드는 걸 도와줬어요.

senses.en: a very big strong house where a king lived

examples.en: The king lived in a big stone {{castle}}.
examples.ko: 왕은 큰 돌로 된 성에 살았어요.

examples.en: We saw an old {{castle}} on the hill.
examples.ko: 우리는 언덕 위의 오래된 성을 봤어요.

senses.en: a small soft animal that people keep at home

examples.en: My {{cat}} likes to sleep on my bed.
examples.ko: 우리 고양이는 내 침대에서 자는 걸 좋아해요.

examples.en: The {{cat}} is playing with a small ball.
examples.ko: 고양이가 작은 공을 가지고 놀고 있어요.

senses.en: to take and hold something that is moving

examples.en: He can {{catch}} a ball with one hand.
examples.ko: 그는 한 손으로 공을 잡을 수 있어요.

examples.en: The cat tried to {{catch}} the mouse.

senses.en: a thing with a back and four legs that one person sits on

examples.en: Please sit down on this {{chair}}.
There are four {{chairs}} around the table.
examples.ko: 식탁 둘레에 의자 네 개가 있어요.

senses.en: a soft yellow food that is made from milk

examples.en: I like {{cheese}} on my bread.
examples.ko: 나는 빵에 치즈 얹어 먹는 걸 좋아해요.

examples.en: The mouse ate all the {{cheese}}.

senses.en: a farm bird that gives us eggs to eat

examples.en: The {{chicken}} laid three eggs today.
examples.ko: 닭이 오늘 달걀 세 개를 낳았어요.

examples.en: We keep some {{chickens}} on our farm.
examples.ko: 우리는 농장에서 닭을 몇 마리 길러요.

senses.en: a sweet brown food that many children love

examples.en: She gave me a piece of {{chocolate}}.
examples.ko: 그녀가 나에게 초콜릿 한 조각을 줬어요.

examples.en: This {{chocolate}} cake is very sweet.

senses.en: a group of children who learn together at school

examples.en: There are twenty children in my {{class}}.
examples.ko: 우리 반에는 아이들이 스무 명 있어요.

examples.en: We have a music {{class}} after lunch.
examples.ko: 우리는 점심 후에 음악 수업이 있어요.

senses.en: not dirty

examples.en: My hands are {{clean}} now after washing.
Please keep your room {{clean}} and nice.

senses.en: to go up a tree or a mountain

examples.en: A monkey can {{climb}} a tree fast.
examples.ko: 원숭이는 나무를 빨리 오를 수 있어요.

examples.en: We {{climbed}} the high mountain together.

senses.en: a thing on the wall that shows you the time

examples.en: The {{clock}} says it is three now.
examples.ko: 시계가 지금 세 시라고 알려 줘요.

examples.en: There is a big {{clock}} in our classroom.

senses.en: to move something so that it is not open

examples.en: Please {{close}} the window, it is cold.
He {{closed}} his book and went to sleep.

senses.en: a white or grey thing in the sky that brings rain

examples.en: Dark {{clouds}} covered the whole sky.
That white {{cloud}} looks like a rabbit.

senses.en: warm clothes that you wear over other clothes when it is cold

examples.en: Wear your {{coat}}, it is cold outside.
He hung his {{coat}} by the door.

senses.en: not warm, like ice or snow in winter

examples.en: The water in the river is very {{cold}}.
I wear a warm coat on {{cold}} days.
examples.ko: 나는 추운 날에는 따뜻한 외투를 입어요.

senses.en: to bring many things together into one place

examples.en: My brother {{collects}} coins from many countries.
examples.ko: 우리 형은 여러 나라의 동전을 모아요.

examples.en: We {{collected}} shells on the beach.

senses.en: to move toward the person who is speaking

examples.en: Please {{come}} here and sit next to me.
My friends {{came}} to my birthday party.

senses.en: to make food hot so that you can eat it

examples.en: My father {{cooks}} dinner on weekends.
She {{cooked}} rice and soup for us.
examples.ko: 그녀는 우리에게 밥과 국을 해 줬어요.

senses.en: a small sweet cake that is hard and round

examples.en: I ate two {{cookies}} after dinner.
examples.ko: 나는 저녁 먹고 쿠키 두 개를 먹었어요.

examples.en: My grandmother makes the best {{cookies}}.

senses.en: a little cold, in a nice way

examples.en: The water in the lake is {{cool}}.
A {{cool}} wind blew in the evening.

senses.en: a big farm animal that gives us milk

examples.en: The {{cow}} is eating grass in the field.
We get milk from a {{cow}}.

senses.en: to make water come from your eyes when you are sad

examples.en: The baby began to {{cry}} at night.
Do not {{cry}}, everything is okay.

senses.en: a small round container that you drink from

examples.en: I drink tea from a red {{cup}}.
Please wash the {{cups}} after dinner.

senses.en: to open or break something with a knife

examples.en: Please {{cut}} the bread into small pieces.
He {{cut}} the apple with a knife.

senses.en: to move your body to music

examples.en: The children {{dance}} to the happy song.
examples.ko: 아이들이 즐거운 노래에 맞춰 춤을 춰요.

examples.en: She likes to sing and {{dance}}.

senses.en: having little or no light

examples.en: The room was very {{dark}} at night.
I am a little afraid of {{dark}} places.

senses.en: the time when there is light from the sun

examples.en: We play outside during the {{day}}.
It was a warm and sunny {{day}}.

senses.en: to choose what you are going to do

examples.en: I can not {{decide}} what to eat.
We {{decided}} to go to the sea.

senses.en: going a long way down from the top

examples.en: The river is very {{deep}} here.
Do not swim in the {{deep}} water.

senses.en: to say what someone or something is like

examples.en: Can you {{describe}} your new teacher?
examples.ko: 너희 새 선생님이 어떤지 말해 줄래?

examples.en: She {{described}} the picture to her friend.

senses.en: a very dry place that is covered with sand

examples.en: It almost never rains in the {{desert}}.
Camels can live in the hot {{desert}}.
examples.ko: 낙타는 뜨거운 사막에서 살 수 있어요.

senses.en: a table where you read and write at school

examples.en: My books are on my {{desk}}.
Please keep the top of your {{desk}} clean.

senses.en: not clean

examples.en: My shoes are {{dirty}} after the rain.
examples.ko: 비가 온 뒤 내 신발이 더러워요.

examples.en: Do not touch the food with {{dirty}} hands.

senses.en: a person who helps sick people get well

examples.en: The {{doctor}} helped me when I was sick.
examples.ko: 내가 아팠을 때 의사 선생님이 도와줬어요.

examples.en: My aunt is a {{doctor}} at a big hospital.

senses.en: an animal that many people keep at home and love

examples.en: Our {{dog}} runs very fast in the park.
examples.ko: 우리 강아지는 공원에서 아주 빨리 달려요.

examples.en: The {{dog}} wants to play with me now.
examples.ko: 강아지가 지금 나랑 놀고 싶어 해요.

senses.en: a toy that looks like a small person or baby

examples.en: The girl sleeps with her {{doll}}.
She has many {{dolls}} in her room.

senses.en: the part of a room that you open to go inside

examples.en: Please close the {{door}} when you leave.
The {{door}} is open, so come inside.

senses.en: to make a picture with a pen or pencil

examples.en: I like to {{draw}} animals and flowers.
examples.ko: 나는 동물과 꽃 그리는 걸 좋아해요.

examples.en: He {{drew}} a picture of his family.

senses.en: a piece of clothes that a girl wears over her body

examples.en: She wore a blue {{dress}} to the party.
examples.ko: 그녀는 파티에 파란 원피스를 입고 갔어요.

examples.en: This {{dress}} is too long for me.

senses.en: to take water or milk into your mouth and make it go down

examples.en: I {{drink}} water when I am thirsty.
He {{drank}} a glass of cold milk.
examples.ko: 그는 차가운 우유 한 잔을 마셨어요.

senses.en: to make a car move and go where you want

examples.en: My father {{drives}} me to school.
She learned to {{drive}} last year.

senses.en: a bird that swims on water and has a wide mouth

examples.en: A {{duck}} is swimming on the lake.
We fed the {{ducks}} some bread.

senses.en: the part of your body that you hear with

examples.en: A rabbit has two long {{ears}}.
examples.ko: 토끼는 긴 귀가 두 개 있어요.

examples.en: I heard the music with my {{ears}}.

senses.en: the round world that we all live on

examples.en: The {{earth}} goes around the sun.
We must keep the {{earth}} clean.

senses.en: not hard to do

examples.en: This game is very {{easy}} to learn.
The test was {{easy}} for me.

senses.en: to put food in your mouth and make it go down

examples.en: We {{eat}} dinner together every night.
examples.ko: 우리는 매일 밤 함께 저녁을 먹어요.

examples.en: She {{ate}} all of her rice.

senses.en: a round white thing that a bird makes its babies in

examples.en: I eat one {{egg}} for breakfast.
The bird sits on its {{eggs}} all day.
examples.ko: 새가 하루 종일 알 위에 앉아 있어요.

senses.en: a very big grey animal with a long nose and two long white teeth

examples.en: An {{elephant}} drinks water with its long nose.
We saw three {{elephants}} at the zoo.
examples.ko: 우리는 동물원에서 코끼리 세 마리를 봤어요.

senses.note: 코끼리의 긴 코는 영어로 trunk라고 불러요.

senses.en: having nothing inside

examples.en: The water bottle is {{empty}} now.
Please throw the {{empty}} bottle away.

senses.en: the part of your face that you use to see

examples.en: Close your {{eyes}} and go to sleep.
The baby has big brown {{eyes}}.
examples.ko: 그 아기는 크고 갈색인 눈을 가졌어요.

senses.en: the front part of your head with your eyes and mouth

examples.en: Please wash your {{face}} in the morning.
She had a big smile on her {{face}}.

senses.en: to go down to the ground when you did not mean to

examples.en: Be careful, do not {{fall}} down the stairs.
The leaves {{fall}} from the trees in autumn.

senses.en: a place where people grow food and keep animals

examples.en: My uncle lives on a big {{farm}}.
There are cows and pigs on the {{farm}}.

senses.en: moving very quickly

examples.en: A {{fast}} horse won the race.
This is a very {{fast}} train.

senses.en: a man who has a child

examples.en: My {{father}} drives me to school.
His {{father}} reads him a story at night.
examples.ko: 그의 아버지는 밤에 그에게 이야기를 읽어 줘요.

senses.en: a wide area of land where grass or food grows

examples.en: The cows are eating grass in the {{field}}.
We played soccer on the green {{field}}.

senses.en: to see something that you were looking for

examples.en: I can not {{find}} my other sock.
examples.ko: 내 나머지 양말 한 짝을 못 찾겠어요.

examples.en: She {{found}} her key under the bed.

senses.en: one of the five long parts at the end of your hand

examples.en: I hurt my {{finger}} on the door.
A baby holds things with its {{fingers}}.

senses.en: the hot bright thing that burns and gives heat

examples.en: We sat near the warm {{fire}}.
You must be careful with {{fire}}.

senses.en: an animal that lives in water and can swim

examples.en: Many {{fish}} live in this cold river.
examples.ko: 이 차가운 강에는 물고기가 많이 살아요.

examples.en: We saw a big {{fish}} in the water.

senses.en: the part of a room that you walk on

examples.en: The children sat on the {{floor}}.
Please do not drop food on the {{floor}}.

senses.en: the pretty part of a plant with a nice smell

examples.en: She gave me a pretty red {{flower}}.
examples.ko: 그녀가 나에게 예쁜 빨간 꽃을 줬어요.

examples.en: Many {{flowers}} grow in our garden.

senses.en: to move through the air like a bird

examples.en: Birds {{fly}} high up in the sky.
The airplane {{flew}} over the sea.

senses.en: the part of your body that you stand on

examples.en: My left {{foot}} hurts a little.
She has small {{feet}} for her age.

senses.en: coming from another country

examples.en: She likes to learn {{foreign}} languages.
We ate {{foreign}} food at the restaurant.

senses.en: a large place with very many trees

examples.en: Many animals live in the {{forest}}.
We walked through the dark {{forest}}.

senses.en: a thing with sharp points that you use to eat

examples.en: She eats her noodles with a {{fork}}.
Please wash the {{forks}} after dinner.

senses.en: a small wild animal with red hair and a long tail

examples.en: A {{fox}} ran quickly into the forest.
The {{fox}} has a long soft tail.

senses.en: someone that you know well and like very much

examples.en: My best {{friend}} lives next to me.
examples.ko: 내 가장 친한 친구는 내 옆집에 살아요.

examples.en: I play games with my {{friends}} after school.
examples.ko: 나는 방과 후에 친구들이랑 게임을 해요.

senses.en: having no more space inside

examples.en: The box is {{full}} of toys.
I am {{full}}, I can not eat more.

senses.en: a fun thing that you play with rules

examples.en: We played a fun {{game}} at the party.
This {{game}} is easy to learn.

senses.en: a place next to a house where flowers and vegetables grow

examples.en: My grandmother grows flowers in her {{garden}}.
We eat vegetables from our own {{garden}}.
examples.ko: 우리는 우리 정원에서 난 채소를 먹어요.

senses.en: a very big tall person in old stories

examples.en: The {{giant}} was taller than the trees.
In the story, a {{giant}} lived on the mountain.

senses.en: a young female child

examples.en: The {{girl}} is drawing a picture.
A {{girl}} in my class sits next to me.
examples.ko: 우리 반 여자아이가 내 옆에 앉아요.

senses.en: to put something in someone's hand to keep

examples.en: Please {{give}} this letter to your teacher.
She {{gave}} me a nice birthday present.
examples.ko: 그녀는 나에게 멋진 생일 선물을 줬어요.

senses.en: to move from one place to another place

examples.en: I {{go}} to school by bus.
They {{went}} to the sea last summer.

senses.en: the father of your mother or your father

examples.en: My {{grandfather}} tells me old stories.
My {{grandfather}} is eighty years old.

senses.en: a small sweet round fruit that grows on a plant

examples.en: These green {{grapes}} are very sweet.
She washed the {{grapes}} before eating them.

senses.en: the thin green plants that cover the ground

examples.en: The children sat on the green {{grass}}.
A cow eats {{grass}} in the field.

senses.en: having the colour of grass and leaves

examples.en: The leaves turn {{green}} in spring.
She has a {{green}} school bag.

senses.en: the land that you walk on outside

examples.en: The leaves fell to the {{ground}}.
We sat on the {{ground}} under a tree.

senses.en: to become bigger over time

examples.en: Plants {{grow}} well with water and sun.
You have {{grown}} so tall this year!
examples.ko: 너 올해 키가 정말 많이 컸구나!

senses.en: the soft thin things that grow on your head

examples.en: She has long black {{hair}} and big eyes.
Please brush your {{hair}} before school.

senses.en: the part of your body at the end of your arm

examples.en: Please wash your {{hands}} before you eat.
She holds a pen in her right {{hand}}.

senses.en: feeling good because something nice happened

examples.en: I am so {{happy}} to see you!
She looked {{happy}} with her new bike.
examples.ko: 그녀는 새 자전거를 받고 기뻐 보였어요.

senses.en: not soft, or not [[easy]] to do

examples.en: This gray rock is very {{hard}}.
The math homework was {{hard}} today.

senses.en: a thing that you wear on your head

examples.en: I wear a {{hat}} on sunny days.
Her red {{hat}} is very pretty.

senses.en: the top part of your body where your face is

examples.en: I wear a hat on my {{head}}.
She turned her {{head}} to look at me.

senses.en: how strong and well your body is

examples.en: Fruit and vegetables are good for your {{health}}.
Exercise is important for good {{health}}.

senses.en: not light, and hard to carry

examples.en: This box is too {{heavy}} for me.
She carried a {{heavy}} bag to school.
examples.ko: 그녀는 무거운 가방을 메고 학교에 갔어요.

senses.en: to do something good for someone who needs it

examples.en: I always {{help}} my mother at home.
Can you {{help}} me with this box?
examples.ko: 이 상자 옮기는 것 좀 도와줄래요?

senses.en: far up from the ground

examples.en: The little bird flew very {{high}}.
That white mountain is very {{high}}.

senses.en: a high place on the land, smaller than a mountain

examples.en: We ran up the green {{hill}}.
Their house is on top of a {{hill}}.

senses.en: a large strong animal that people ride

examples.en: The {{horse}} runs fast across the field.
She likes to ride a brown {{horse}}.
examples.ko: 그녀는 갈색 말을 타는 걸 좋아해요.

senses.en: a place where doctors help sick people get well

examples.en: The doctor works at a big {{hospital}}.
We went to the {{hospital}} to see my aunt.

senses.en: very warm, like fire or the summer sun

examples.en: The soup is too {{hot}} to eat now.
examples.ko: 국이 너무 뜨거워서 지금 못 먹어요.

examples.en: Summer days are very {{hot}} here.

senses.en: a building where people live

examples.en: They live in a big {{house}}.
My {{house}} is close to the school.

senses.en: very big, much bigger than usual

examples.en: A whale is a {{huge}} animal.
They live in a {{huge}} house near the sea.
examples.ko: 그들은 바다 근처 거대한 집에 살아요.

senses.en: water that has become very cold and hard

examples.en: Please put some {{ice}} in my drink.
examples.ko: 제 음료에 얼음 좀 넣어 주세요.

examples.en: The {{ice}} on the lake is very thick.

senses.en: to make something better than before

examples.en: My English is starting to {{improve}}.
Reading books will {{improve}} your writing.

senses.en: to make a new thing that people did not have before

examples.en: Do you know who {{invented}} the telephone?
She wants to {{invent}} a new kind of robot.
examples.ko: 그녀는 새로운 로봇을 발명하고 싶어 해요.

senses.en: an area of land with water all around it

examples.en: We took a boat to the small {{island}}.
examples.ko: 우리는 배를 타고 작은 섬에 갔어요.

examples.en: Many birds live on that {{island}}.

senses.en: a short coat that you wear when it is cold

examples.en: Put on your {{jacket}}, it is cold outside.
She has a warm blue {{jacket}}.
examples.ko: 그녀는 따뜻한 파란 재킷을 가지고 있어요.

senses.en: the sweet water that comes out of a fruit

examples.en: I drink orange {{juice}} every morning.
examples.ko: 나는 매일 아침 오렌지 주스를 마셔요.

examples.en: May I have a glass of apple {{juice}}?

senses.en: to push yourself up into the air with your legs

examples.en: The children {{jump}} over the rope.
My dog can {{jump}} very high.
examples.ko: 우리 개는 아주 높이 뛸 수 있어요.

senses.en: a small metal thing that you use to open a door

examples.en: I lost the {{key}} to my house.
She keeps her {{keys}} in her bag.

senses.en: nice and good to other people

examples.en: My teacher is very {{kind}} to us.
It was {{kind}} of you to help me.

senses.en: a man who rules a country

examples.en: The {{king}} lived in a big castle.
A lion is called the {{king}} of animals.

senses.en: a sharp thing that you use to cut food

examples.en: Be careful with the sharp {{knife}}.
He cut the bread with a {{knife}}.

senses.en: a large area of water with land all around it

examples.en: We rode a boat on the {{lake}}.
Many ducks swim on the {{lake}}.

senses.en: the words that the people of one country speak

examples.en: English is a {{language}} that many people speak.
She can speak three different {{languages}}.
examples.ko: 그녀는 세 가지 언어를 할 수 있어요.

senses.en: the long part of your body that you walk with

examples.en: A dog runs on four {{legs}}.
My {{legs}} are tired after the long walk.

senses.en: words that you write and send to someone

examples.en: I wrote a {{letter}} to my grandfather.
She got a {{letter}} from her friend.

senses.en: a big wild animal that is called the king of animals

examples.en: The {{lion}} has a loud and strong voice.
We saw a {{lion}} sleeping at the zoo.
examples.ko: 우리는 동물원에서 자고 있는 사자를 봤어요.

senses.en: to hear a sound and think about it

examples.en: I {{listen}} to music every evening.
Please {{listen}} to your teacher in class.

senses.en: far from one end to the other end

examples.en: An elephant has a {{long}} nose.
We walked a {{long}} way to the river.

senses.en: to turn your eyes to see something

examples.en: {{Look}} at all the beautiful flowers!
She {{looked}} up at the night sky.

senses.en: close to the ground, not high

examples.en: The branch is {{low}} enough to touch.
examples.ko: 그 나뭇가지는 손이 닿을 만큼 낮아요.

examples.en: Please speak in a {{low}} voice here.

senses.en: to build something new with your hands

examples.en: Let's {{make}} a big snowman together.
She {{made}} a birthday card for her friend.
examples.ko: 그녀는 친구를 위해 생일 카드를 만들었어요.

senses.en: a picture that shows where places are

examples.en: We looked at a {{map}} of the city.
There is a big {{map}} on the wall.

senses.en: the food that comes from the body of an animal

examples.en: We eat {{meat}} and vegetables for dinner.
This {{meat}} is too hard to eat.
examples.ko: 이 고기는 너무 질겨서 못 먹겠어요.

senses.en: something that you take to feel better when you are sick

examples.en: The doctor gave me some {{medicine}}.
examples.ko: 의사 선생님이 나에게 약을 좀 줬어요.

examples.en: Take this {{medicine}} after every meal.
examples.ko: 이 약을 매 끼니 후에 드세요.

senses.en: the white drink that comes from a cow

examples.en: I drink a glass of {{milk}} every morning.
examples.ko: 나는 매일 아침 우유 한 잔을 마셔요.

examples.en: The baby drinks warm {{milk}} before bed.
examples.ko: 아기는 자기 전에 따뜻한 우유를 마셔요.

senses.note: 셀 수 없는 명사예요. 'a milk'가 아니라 'a glass of milk'라고 해요.

senses.en: an animal that climbs trees and has a long tail

examples.en: The {{monkey}} ate a yellow banana.
A {{monkey}} can climb a tree very fast.
examples.ko: 원숭이는 나무를 아주 빨리 올라갈 수 있어요.

senses.en: one of the twelve parts of a year

examples.en: My birthday is in this {{month}}.
One year has twelve {{months}} in it.

senses.en: the round white thing that you see in the night sky

examples.en: The {{moon}} was very bright last night.
We can see the {{moon}} from our window.
examples.ko: 우리는 창문으로 달을 볼 수 있어요.

senses.en: the early part of the day after you wake up

examples.en: I eat bread in the {{morning}}.
Every {{morning}} she walks to school.

senses.en: a woman who has a child

examples.en: My {{mother}} makes dinner for us.
examples.ko: 우리 엄마는 우리에게 저녁을 만들어 줘요.

examples.en: Her {{mother}} works at a hospital.

senses.en: a very high place made of rock and ground

examples.en: We climbed a high {{mountain}} last week.
Snow covers the {{mountain}} in winter.

senses.en: a very small animal with a long thin tail

examples.en: A small {{mouse}} ran under the bed.
The cat wants to catch the {{mouse}}.

senses.en: the part of your face that you use to eat and speak

examples.en: Open your {{mouth}} and say ah.
Do not talk with food in your {{mouth}}.

senses.en: the nice sound that you make when you sing or play

examples.en: I listen to {{music}} every evening.
She plays happy {{music}} on the piano.

senses.en: the word that people use to call you

examples.en: My {{name}} is on my school bag.
Please write your {{name}} at the top.

senses.en: not wide, small from one side to the other side

examples.en: We walked down a {{narrow}} street.
The bridge is too {{narrow}} for a car.
examples.ko: 그 다리는 자동차가 지나가기엔 너무 좁아요.

senses.en: made a short time ago, not old

examples.en: I got a {{new}} bike for my birthday.
She is wearing a {{new}} dress today.

senses.en: good and pleasing

examples.en: We had a {{nice}} time at the beach.
That is a {{nice}} picture you drew.

senses.en: the dark time when the sun is not in the sky

examples.en: The stars come out at {{night}}.
I read a book every {{night}}.

senses.en: the part of your face that you use to smell

examples.en: An elephant has a very long {{nose}}.
I smell the flowers with my {{nose}}.

senses.en: to see or hear something for the first time

examples.en: Did you {{notice}} her new dress?
I {{noticed}} a small bird in the tree.
examples.ko: 나는 나무에 있는 작은 새를 알아차렸어요.

senses.en: a person who helps a doctor take care of sick people

examples.en: The {{nurse}} was very kind to me.
My sister wants to be a {{nurse}}.
examples.ko: 우리 언니는 간호사가 되고 싶어 해요.

senses.en: a very big area of deep salt water

examples.en: Many kinds of fish live in the {{ocean}}.
The {{ocean}} looks blue and very deep.

senses.en: made a long time ago, or having lived many years

examples.en: This is a very {{old}} book from my grandfather.
examples.ko: 이건 우리 할아버지의 아주 오래된 책이에요.

examples.en: My grandmother is quite {{old}} now.
examples.ko: 우리 할머니는 이제 꽤 나이가 드셨어요.

senses.en: to move something so that it is not closed

examples.en: Please {{open}} the door for me.
She {{opened}} the box and looked inside.

senses.en: a round sweet fruit with a thick skin

examples.en: I drink {{orange}} juice for breakfast.
She gave me a sweet {{orange}}.

senses.en: the thin flat thing that you write or draw on

examples.en: Please write your name on the {{paper}}.
She drew a cat on white {{paper}}.

senses.en: a large open place with grass and trees where people play

examples.en: We play in the {{park}} after school.
There are many trees in this {{park}}.

senses.en: a thin thing that you use to write with

examples.en: I write my name with a black {{pen}}.
May I use your {{pen}}, please?

senses.en: a thin thing made of wood that you use to write or draw

examples.en: She draws a picture with a {{pencil}}.
My {{pencil}} is too short now.

senses.en: a big music thing that you play with your fingers

examples.en: She plays the {{piano}} very well.
There is an old {{piano}} in our house.

senses.en: a drawing or an image of someone or something

examples.en: I drew a {{picture}} of my family.
There are many {{pictures}} in this book.

senses.en: a fat pink farm animal with a short tail

examples.en: The {{pig}} is sleeping in the mud.
A baby {{pig}} is very small and pink.

senses.en: a flat round food with cheese on top

examples.en: We ate {{pizza}} at my birthday party.
examples.ko: 우리는 내 생일 파티에서 피자를 먹었어요.

examples.en: I want one more piece of {{pizza}}.
examples.ko: 피자 한 조각 더 먹고 싶어요.

senses.en: a very big round thing that moves around the sun

examples.en: The earth is the {{planet}} we live on.
There are eight {{planets}} around the sun.
examples.ko: 태양 주위에는 여덟 개의 행성이 있어요.

senses.en: to do something fun with toys or with friends

examples.en: The children are {{playing}} in the park.
Do you want to {{play}} with me today?

senses.en: to take part in a game or a sport

examples.en: Let's {{play}} soccer with my friends after school.
They {{play}} basketball together every weekend.

senses.en: to make music with a piano, a drum, or a guitar

examples.en: He can {{play}} the piano very well.

senses.note: 악기 이름 앞에는 the를 써요: play the piano

senses.en: a round vegetable that grows under the ground

examples.en: We cooked {{potatoes}} for lunch today.
A {{potato}} grows under the ground.

senses.en: to make something ready to use

examples.en: My mother is {{preparing}} dinner for us.
examples.ko: 우리 엄마가 우리 저녁을 준비하고 계세요.

examples.en: We {{prepared}} for the test all week.

senses.en: nice to look at

examples.en: She drew a {{pretty}} yellow flower.
What a {{pretty}} dress you have!

senses.en: to keep someone or something safe from danger

examples.en: A helmet {{protects}} your head when you fall.
examples.ko: 헬멧은 넘어질 때 머리를 지켜 줘요.

examples.en: We must {{protect}} the animals in the forest.

senses.en: a woman who rules a country

examples.en: The {{queen}} wore a golden crown.
The {{queen}} smiled at the children.

senses.en: making very little sound

examples.en: Please be {{quiet}} in the library.
The house was {{quiet}} at night.

senses.en: a small soft animal with long ears that can jump

examples.en: The white {{rabbit}} has very long ears.
A {{rabbit}} can jump high and run fast.
examples.ko: 토끼는 높이 뛰고 빨리 달릴 수 있어요.

senses.en: a thing that you listen to music and news on

examples.en: My grandmother listens to the {{radio}}.
Please turn on the {{radio}} for me.

senses.en: water that falls from the sky in small drops

examples.en: The {{rain}} fell all day long today.
We can not play outside in the {{rain}}.
examples.ko: 비가 와서 우리는 밖에서 놀 수 없어요.

senses.en: to look at words and understand what they mean

examples.en: I like to {{read}} books about animals.
examples.ko: 나는 동물에 관한 책 읽는 걸 좋아해요.

examples.en: She {{read}} the story to her little brother.

senses.en: having the colour of blood or a tomato

examples.en: She is wearing a {{red}} hat.
I like the {{red}} flowers best.

senses.en: the small white seeds that many people eat every day

examples.en: We eat {{rice}} with almost every meal.
examples.ko: 우리는 거의 매 끼니 밥을 먹어요.

examples.en: She cooked warm {{rice}} for our dinner.

senses.en: a long line of water that moves across the land

examples.en: Many fish live in this {{river}}.
We walked along the {{river}} together.

senses.en: a very hard thing that comes from the ground

examples.en: A big {{rock}} was next to the road.
The children sat on the flat {{rock}}.

senses.en: one part inside a house with its own walls

examples.en: My {{room}} has a big window.
Please clean your {{room}} before dinner.

senses.en: to move very quickly on your feet

examples.en: I can {{run}} faster than my brother.
examples.ko: 나는 우리 형보다 빨리 달릴 수 있어요.

examples.en: She {{ran}} to the bus stop.

senses.en: feeling bad because something is not nice

examples.en: He was {{sad}} when his dog was sick.
The {{sad}} girl began to cry.

senses.en: a cold food made from vegetables

examples.en: I eat {{salad}} with my dinner.
She put carrots in the {{salad}}.

senses.en: the white thing that makes food taste better

examples.en: Please put some {{salt}} in the soup.
Too much {{salt}} is not good for you.
examples.ko: 소금을 너무 많이 먹으면 몸에 안 좋아요.

senses.en: the very small soft pieces of rock on a beach

examples.en: The children played in the {{sand}}.
My feet are covered with {{sand}}.

senses.en: food made with meat or cheese between two pieces of bread

examples.en: I made a cheese {{sandwich}} for lunch.
She put a tomato in her {{sandwich}}.

senses.en: a place where children go to learn

examples.en: I go to {{school}} with my friends.
Our {{school}} is close to my house.

senses.en: the very big area of salt water on the earth

examples.en: We swam in the blue {{sea}}.
Many kinds of fish live in the {{sea}}.

senses.en: clothes that you wear on the top part of your body

examples.en: He is wearing a white {{shirt}} today.
examples.ko: 그는 오늘 하얀 셔츠를 입고 있어요.

examples.en: My {{shirt}} got dirty during the game.

senses.en: a thing that you wear on your foot

examples.en: My new {{shoes}} are white and clean.
Please take off your {{shoes}} inside.

senses.en: a place where you buy things with money

examples.en: My mother went to the {{shop}} to buy milk.
examples.ko: 우리 엄마는 우유를 사러 가게에 갔어요.

examples.en: There is a small {{shop}} near my house.
examples.ko: 우리 집 근처에 작은 가게가 있어요.

senses.en: not long, or not tall

examples.en: My hair is very {{short}} now.
He is {{short}}, so he sits at the front.

senses.en: to make music with your voice

examples.en: We {{sing}} a happy song in class.
examples.ko: 우리는 수업 시간에 즐거운 노래를 불러요.

examples.en: A bird {{sang}} outside my window.

senses.en: a girl who has the same mother and father as you

examples.en: My {{sister}} is two years older than me.
examples.ko: 우리 언니는 나보다 두 살 많아요.

examples.en: I play with my little {{sister}} every day.

senses.en: to rest on the lower part of your body

examples.en: Please {{sit}} down on the floor.
The cat {{sat}} on the warm chair.

senses.en: the wide open space high above your head

examples.en: The {{sky}} is blue on a sunny day.
Many stars shine in the night {{sky}}.

senses.en: to close your eyes and rest your body at night

examples.en: I {{sleep}} for eight hours every night.
examples.ko: 나는 매일 밤 여덟 시간 자요.

examples.en: The baby {{slept}} for the whole afternoon.

senses.en: not moving with much speed

examples.en: A turtle is a very {{slow}} animal.
The bus was {{slow}} because of the rain.

senses.en: little in size

examples.en: A mouse is a {{small}} animal.
She lives in a {{small}} house near us.
examples.ko: 그녀는 우리 근처 작은 집에 살아요.

senses.en: soft white drops that fall from the sky when it is cold

examples.en: The children play in the white {{snow}}.
We make a snowman when it {{snows}}.

senses.en: a game where you kick a ball with your foot

examples.en: We play {{soccer}} in the park after school.
examples.ko: 우리는 방과 후에 공원에서 축구를 해요.

examples.en: He is very good at {{soccer}}.

senses.en: clothes that you wear on your foot inside a shoe

examples.en: I put on clean {{socks}} every day.
One of my {{socks}} is lost again.
examples.ko: 내 양말 한 짝이 또 없어졌어요.

senses.en: a hot food that you eat with a spoon

examples.en: This warm {{soup}} is very delicious.
My mother made {{soup}} for dinner.

senses.en: a thing that you use to eat soup

examples.en: I eat soup with a {{spoon}}.
Please put a {{spoon}} next to each plate.

senses.en: the warm time of the year when flowers grow

examples.en: Many pretty flowers grow in {{spring}}.
The weather is warm in {{spring}}.

senses.en: a small bright light that you see in the night sky

examples.en: I can see a bright {{star}} tonight.
There are many {{stars}} in the night sky.

senses.en: a small hard piece of rock

examples.en: He threw a {{stone}} into the river.
There are many small {{stones}} on the road.

senses.en: having much power in your body

examples.en: A bear is a very {{strong}} animal.
He is {{strong}} enough to lift the box.
examples.ko: 그는 상자를 들 만큼 힘이 세요.

senses.en: the sweet white thing that you put in food

examples.en: I put {{sugar}} in my milk.
This cake has too much {{sugar}}.

senses.en: the very bright star that gives us light in the day

examples.en: The {{sun}} is very bright this morning.
Plants need water and {{sun}} to grow.

senses.en: to move in the water with your arms and legs

examples.en: I learned to {{swim}} last summer.
The fish {{swam}} away very fast.

senses.en: a thing with a flat top and legs that you put things on

examples.en: We eat dinner at the {{table}}.
Please put the books on the {{table}}.

senses.en: to hold something and carry it with you

examples.en: Please {{take}} this book to your teacher.
He {{took}} an apple from the box.

senses.en: not short, going up very high

examples.en: My father is very {{tall}} and strong.
A giraffe has a {{tall}} neck.

senses.en: a person who helps children learn

examples.en: Our {{teacher}} is very kind to us.
The {{teacher}} wrote the words on the board.

senses.en: a thing that you watch shows and movies on

examples.en: We watch {{television}} together after dinner.
There is a big {{television}} in our room.

senses.en: a small house that you sleep in when you camp outside

examples.en: We slept in a {{tent}} near the lake.
My father put up the {{tent}} on the grass.

senses.en: a big wild animal like a large cat with black lines

examples.en: The {{tiger}} sleeps under a tree all day.
examples.ko: 호랑이는 하루 종일 나무 밑에서 자요.

examples.en: A {{tiger}} can run very fast to catch food.
examples.ko: 호랑이는 먹이를 잡으려고 아주 빨리 달려요.

senses.en: very small, much smaller than usual

examples.en: An ant is a {{tiny}} insect.
She wore a {{tiny}} ring on her finger.
examples.ko: 그녀는 손가락에 아주 작은 반지를 꼈어요.

senses.en: a soft round red fruit that people put in salad

examples.en: I put a {{tomato}} in my sandwich.
These red {{tomatoes}} grow in our garden.
examples.ko: 이 빨간 토마토는 우리 정원에서 자라요.

senses.en: one of the hard white parts in your mouth that you eat with

examples.en: The baby has one small {{tooth}}.
Brush your {{teeth}} before you sleep.

senses.en: a thing that children play with

examples.en: The baby is playing with a soft {{toy}}.
Please put your {{toys}} in the box.

senses.en: a long line of cars that moves on metal lines

examples.en: We took a {{train}} to the mountain.
The {{train}} is very fast and long.

senses.en: a tall plant with a hard brown body and many leaves

examples.en: A big {{tree}} grows behind our house.
examples.ko: 우리 집 뒤에 큰 나무가 자라요.

examples.en: Many {{trees}} grow near the river.

senses.en: a thing that you hold over your head in the rain

examples.en: Take your {{umbrella}}, it is raining.
Her {{umbrella}} is blue with white stars.
examples.ko: 그녀의 우산은 파란 바탕에 하얀 별이 있어요.

senses.en: the brother of your mother or your father

examples.en: My {{uncle}} works on a farm.
My {{uncle}} taught me how to swim.
examples.ko: 우리 삼촌이 나에게 수영을 가르쳐 줬어요.

senses.en: a very small town in the country

examples.en: My grandmother lives in a small {{village}}.
Everyone in the {{village}} knows each other.

senses.en: to move on your feet from one place to another

examples.en: I {{walk}} to school every morning.
We {{walked}} along the river together.

senses.en: the side part of a room or a house

examples.en: There is a big picture on the {{wall}}.
The clock on the {{wall}} is very old.

senses.en: a little hot, in a nice way

examples.en: I wear a {{warm}} coat in winter.
The spring sun feels very {{warm}}.

senses.en: to tell someone that danger may come

examples.en: The sign {{warns}} people about the deep water.
examples.ko: 그 표지판은 사람들에게 깊은 물을 조심하라고 알려요.

examples.en: She {{warned}} me not to touch the fire.
examples.ko: 그녀는 나에게 불을 만지지 말라고 경고했어요.

senses.en: to make something clean with water

examples.en: Please {{wash}} your hands before dinner.
My mother {{washed}} my dirty clothes.
examples.ko: 우리 엄마가 내 더러운 옷을 빨아 줬어요.

senses.en: the clear thing that falls as rain and that we drink

examples.en: Please give me a glass of {{water}}.
Fish live in the {{water}} of the river.

senses.note: 셀 수 없는 명사예요. 'a glass of water'라고 해요.

senses.en: a very big green fruit that is red inside

examples.en: We ate cold {{watermelon}} in the summer.
This {{watermelon}} is sweet and red.

senses.en: not strong, and not having much power

examples.en: I felt {{weak}} when I was sick.
The baby bird is still very {{weak}}.

senses.en: a time of seven days

examples.en: We have music class twice a {{week}}.
examples.ko: 우리는 일주일에 두 번 음악 수업이 있어요.

examples.en: I will see my friend next {{week}}.
examples.ko: 나는 다음 주에 친구를 만날 거예요.

senses.en: covered with water, not dry

examples.en: My clothes are {{wet}} from the rain.
Be careful, the floor is {{wet}}.

senses.en: having the colour of snow or milk

examples.en: The falling snow is soft and {{white}}.
She wore a {{white}} dress to school.
examples.ko: 그녀는 하얀 원피스를 입고 학교에 갔어요.

senses.en: big from one side to the other side

examples.en: This is a very {{wide}} river.
The park has a {{wide}} open field.

senses.en: living in nature, not kept by people

examples.en: A tiger is a {{wild}} animal.
We saw {{wild}} flowers on the mountain.

senses.en: air that moves fast outside

examples.en: The {{wind}} is very strong today.
The {{wind}} blew my hat away.

senses.en: the glass part of a wall that you open for air and light

examples.en: Please open the {{window}} to let in air.
I can see the moon through my {{window}}.
examples.ko: 나는 창문으로 달을 볼 수 있어요.

senses.en: the cold time of the year with snow

examples.en: We make a snowman in {{winter}}.
The days are short in {{winter}}.

senses.en: to make words on paper with a pen

examples.en: Please {{write}} your name on the paper.
He {{wrote}} a letter to his friend.

senses.en: a time of twelve months

examples.en: My little sister is nine {{years}} old.
We visit the sea every {{year}}.

senses.en: having the colour of the sun or a banana

examples.en: The {{yellow}} flowers are very pretty.
A duck has a {{yellow}} mouth.
